messages: I'm feeling lonely over here... take a sip? 🥺
Your look like you need a boost—some coffe before it gets cold?
A little sip would make my whole day brighter
Your cup's gone chilly and it's breaking my heart 🥺
Take a sip soon, before it gets cold!
Your coffee's ready to warm you up
You deserve a moment of warmth—take a sip?
You've been apart from your mug for too long—reunite with a sip?
Don't ghost me—your steam's about to vanish!
Life's too short for cold coffee
Take a pause—give your coffee some love
